nasb.text: That the generation to come might know, even the children yet to be born, That they may arise and tell them to their children,

esv.text: that the next generation might know them, the children yet unborn, and arise and tell them to their children,

cnv.text: 好使後代的人，包括將要出生的兒女，都可以知道； 他們也要起來，告訴他們的子孫，

ccb.text: 好让他们也照样教导自己的子孙后代， 世代相传。

csbs.text: 好让将要出生的后代子孙可以明白， 并且起来向他们的子孙讲述；
